Run PAINTOR

Source: R/PAINTOR_run.R
PAINTOR_run.Rd

Run PAINTOR executable.

Usage

PAINTOR_run(
  paintor_path = NULL,
  PT_results_path,
  inputFile_path,
  ld_paths,
  zscore_cols,
  max_causal,
  Gname = "Enrichment.Estimates.txt",
  RESname = "results.txt",
  ANname = "annotations.txt",
  annotation_names = NULL,
  method = c("mcmc", "enumerate"),
  seed = 2022,
  auto_restart = FALSE,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

paintor_path

[Optional] Path to PAINTOR executable. Will be automatically installed if set to NULL (default).

max_causal

Maximum number of causal SNPs.

method

"enumerate" is actually faster when max_causal is small (<3), but far larger max_causal use "mcmc".

seed

Set the random seed for reproducible results.

auto_restart

Automatically rerun PAINTOR if it fails the first time.

verbose

Print messages.

On this page

Developed by Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj.
